svg.text: Clear: Goal-Conditioned, Faithful Re-Narration of Web Pages
A two-phase multimodal pipeline with an auditable facts-and-claims ledger
‹ Student Name 1 › · ‹ Student Name 2 › · ‹ Student Name 3 › | Advisor: ‹ Prof. Name ›
Boğaziçi University · Department of Computer Engineering · CmpE 492 Senior Project · ‹ Term, Year ›

text.tspan: Web pages bury content under clutter and
present it the same way for every reader,
each fix only a sliver. A single LLM rewrite
images, and can't be checked for fabrication.

svg.text: re-narrate a page into faithful new
writing adapted to the reader's goal — keeping coverage complete.
One LLM call on raw HTML must clean, comprehend,
compress, and compose — all at once.

g.text: Boilerplate leaks in; real content gets cut.
Long pages lose content with no signal.
No checkpoint to audit; figures ignored.

svg.text: No checkpoint between perception and generation.
Page-faithful — draws only from the ledger; nothing invented.
Bounded coverage — wall-clock / token / storage budgets;
every skip is logged, never silent.
Graceful degradation — orchestrator fail → local assembly.
Web page — DOM text + images + chrome
FACTS & CLAIMS LEDGER — atomic typed facts
A checkpoint between perception and generation.
Reading goal — depth · focus · style · language
Each entry carries evidence · confidence · provenance · section / image links.
→ makes faithfulness and coverage directly measurable.
‹ Summarize what you built and what you learned. ›

g.text: Result. ‹ Splitting perception from generation made
Impact. ‹ Readers get goal-fit writing with no
Limitations. ‹ Budget caps coverage; vision is a
curator, not a full fact extractor. ›
Future work. ‹ On-device models, richer goals,

svg.text: ‹ One sentence the reader should remember about
‹ Thank your advisor, jury, and anyone who helped. › · Built as a Chrome MV3 extension (OpenAI Responses API, vanilla JS).
